creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2008-07-19 21:29:16 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    www                  Makefile 
  Added files:
    www/xpi-foxyproxy    Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  FoxyProxy is an advanced proxy management tool that completely
  replaces Firefox's limited proxying capabilities. It offers more
  features than SwitchProxy, ProxyButton, QuickProxy, xyzproxy,
  ProxyTex, TorButton, etc.
  
  WWW: https://addons.mozilla.org/firefox/2464/
  
  PR:             ports/124519
  Submitted by:   Ashish Shukla <wahjava at gmail.com>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.2100    +1 -0      ports/www/Makefile
  1.1       +21 -0     ports/www/xpi-foxyproxy/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/www/xpi-foxyproxy/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +6 -0      ports/www/xpi-foxyproxy/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +24 -0     ports/www/xpi-foxyproxy/pkg-plist (new)
